_meta.description: Central Pet shift Outcome & Notes options. Consumed by the Stage 3 guided visit flow (SHIFT_LOG step) and served via GET /api/central-pet/shift-day/visit-flow/outcome-options. Reps must select at least one option to seal a visit. 'kind' groups options: 'outcome' = normal/positive work done, 'variance' = an exception/issue worth documenting. Supervisor-editable; add/remove options here without code changes.
_meta.gateRule: listUnmetRequirements (src/lib/visit-flow.js) blocks seal until shiftLog.outcomes has >= 1 entry. If any selected optionId is 'other', shiftLog.custom must be non-empty.
